articles.author: Samantha Cookinham, David K. Li
articles.title: Anthony Head, ‘Buffy the Vampire Slayer’ and ‘Ted Lasso’ actor, dies at 72 - NBC News
articles.description: British actor Anthony Head, known to generations of American TV viewers through polar opposite characters named Rupert on “Buffy the Vampire Slayer” and “Ted Lasso,” has died, his family said Friday
articles.content:
British actor Anthony Head, known to generations of American TV viewers through polar opposite characters named Rupert on Buffy the Vampire Slayer and Ted Lasso, has died, his family said Friday.
